channel.title: Golang on Software Developer and Entrepreneur
channel.description: Recent content in Golang on Software Developer and Entrepreneur

item.title: Hugo
item.description: hugo is a static website generator developed in golang. Create a New Site hugo new site [SITE_NAME] Add a theme cd [SITE_NAME] git init git submodule add [THEME_REPO_URL] echo 'theme = "[THEME_NAME]"' >> config.
